name: Napier AI
description: Napier AI is an enterprise AML platform using explainable AI and a no-code rule builder for real-time transaction monitoring, screening and case management. Used by banks, payment providers and wealth managers to cut false positives dramati

seo.title: Napier AI — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Napier AI: Napier AI is an enterprise AML platform using explainable AI and a no-code rule builder for real-time transaction monitoring, screening and case mana

when_to_use: Explainable AI transaction monitoring for bank AML audits
No-code rule builder for custom typology detection
False positive reduction for existing AML alert backlogs
Case management integration for financial crime investigations
Real-time screening for SWIFT payment AML compliance

pros: No-code rule builder for monitoring scenarios
cons: Enterprise implementation, not a weekend project
Licensing scales fast with transaction volumes
Explainability depends on proper rule tuning
Customer base skews large banks, not fintechs
review.verdict: Modern enterprise AML platform with usable ML explainability; priced for banks and large PSPs.
review.best_for: Banks, payment providers and wealth managers wanting explainable AI-driven AML at scale
review.not_for: Early fintechs needing a lightweight screening API without a full platform rollout

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
